license.origin: Procedurally generated color bars/motion and sine tone; contains no captured, third-party, personal, or production media.

generator.command: ffmpeg -f lavfi -i testsrc2=size=640x360:rate=30 -f lavfi -i sine=frequency=440:sample_rate=48000 -t 2 -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -profile:v high -level:v 3.1 -preset veryslow -crf 18 -c:a aac -b:a 128k -movflags +faststart -map_metadata -1 -metadata creation_time=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z output.mp4
